title: Mark I Bulk Transport

The '''Mark I Bulk Transport''' was manufactured by [[Sienar Ships]].

A common long-range bulk transport, the Mark I possessed two decks<ref name="CRO" /> and a dorsal [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon turret]], though due to the ship's lack of shields it was often considered an easy target for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="PP" />

Common throughout the galaxy, though especially among civilized regions, the craft was sold second-hand at a high resale price.<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

Able to be modified, the Mark I could be made battle worthy through reinforcement of the ship's already robust hull, with [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] and additional laser cannons having little impact on the ships overall performance.<ref name="CRO" />

One such vessel was the heavily modified ''[[Cygnante]]'', used by [[The Shield]].<ref name="CRO" />
